name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for sharing confidential information between two parties

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, capturing party details and agreement specifics

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement governing SaaS and cloud-based software subscriptions

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access product collaboration and feedback

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments and support obligations

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for consulting, development, and service engagements

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for GDPR and data privacy compliance between controllers and processors

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for channel, reseller, and referral partnerships

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise and perpetual software licensing

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-limited software trials and proof-of-concept engagements

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA compliance when handling protected health information

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum for governing the use of AI features and models within an existing agreement
